252:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??

255:           : text || `Cloudflare API request failed with status ${response.status}`);
256:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);

259:     if (parsed.success === false) {

316:         alias: `dep-${dnsSafeLabel(input.deploymentId)}`,
317:         output_dir: input.outputDir,
318:         asset_upload_id: assetUploadId,
319:         preview_url: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
320:       }),
321:     });
322:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
323:     const result =
324:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
325:     const providerDeploymentId =
326:       typeof result.id === 'string' && result.id.trim() ? result.id.trim() : `cfdep_${input.deploymentId}`;
327: 
328:     return {
329:       providerDeploymentId,
330:       status: 'running',
331:       deployedUrl: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
332:     };
333:   }
334: 
335:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
336:     const response = await this.request(
337:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}`
338:     );
339:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
340:     const result =
341:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
342:     const state = typeof result.status === 'string' ? mapProviderState(result.status) : 'running';
343:     return {
344:       status: state,
345:       deployedUrl: typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim() ? result.preview_url : null,
346:       errorCode: typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined,
347:       errorMessage: typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined,
348:     };

354:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
355:     );

363:   }

366: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
367:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {

375:   if (configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {

137:       return 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying (template files like .env.example are allowed).';
138:     case 'provider_auth_failed':
139:       return 'Verify CF_ACCOUNT_ID and CF_API_TOKEN, then rerun preflight.';
140:     case 'provider_scope_missing':
141:       return 'Grant Workers Scripts/Routes edit scope to CF_API_TOKEN and rerun preflight.';
142:     case 'provider_project_not_found':
143:       return 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to an existing Workers project and retry.';
144:     case 'provider_rate_limited':
145:       return 'Retry deploy after Cloudflare rate limits reset.';
146:     case 'provider_invalid_output_dir':
147:       return 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build directory (for example dist or out) and retry.';
148:     case 'provider_deploy_failed':
149:       return 'Check provider deployment logs and retry after fixing configuration or build output.';
150:     default:
151:       return null;
152:   }
153: }

155: async function sha256Hex(input: string): Promise<string> {
156:   const digest = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(input));
157:   return Array.from(new Uint8Array(digest))
158:     .map((byte) => byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'))
159:     .join('');
160: }

206: export async function handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment(
207:   workspaceId: string,
208:   request: Request,
209:   env: Env,
210:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
211: ): Promise<Response> {
212:   try {
213:     const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
214:     if (enabled) {
215:       return enabled;
216:     }
217: 
218:     const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
219:     if (workspaceCheck) {
220:       return workspaceCheck;
221:     }
222: 
223:     if (!env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE && !ctx) {
224:       return jsonResponse(
225:         {
226:           error: 'Workspace deployment runner is unavailable',
227:           code: 'workspace_deploy_runner_unavailable',
228:         },
229:         503
230:       );
231:     }
232: 
233:     const idempotencyKey = (request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key') ?? '').trim();
234:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
235:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
236:     }
237: 
238:     const payloadRaw = await request.text();
239:     let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
240:     if (payloadRaw.trim()) {
241:       const parsed = JSON.parse(payloadRaw) as unknown;
242:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
243:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
244:       }
245:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
246:     }
247: 
248:     const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
249:     const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
250:     if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
251:       return jsonResponse(
252:         {
253:           error: providerConfigError,
254:           code: 'provider_config_invalid',
255:         },
256:         400
257:       );
258:     }
259:     if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
260:       return jsonResponse(
261:         {
262:           error: 'Unsupported deployment provider',
263:           code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider',
264:           allowedProviders: ['simulated', 'cloudflare_workers_assets'],
265:         },
266:         400
267:       );
268:     }
269:     const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
270:     const retry =
271:       payload.retry && typeof payload.retry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.retry)
272:         ? (payload.retry as Record<string, unknown>)
273:         : {};
274:     const validation =
275:       payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
276:         ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
277:         : {};
278:     const provenance =
279:       payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
280:         ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
281:         : {};
282:     const autoFix =
283:       payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
284:         ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
285:         : {};
286:     const toolchain =
287:       payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
288:         ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
289:         : {};
290:     const cache =
291:       payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
292:         ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
293:         : {};
294:     const deploy =
295:       payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
296:         ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
297:         : {};
298:     const maxRetries = parseInteger(retry.maxRetries, 2, 0, 5);
299:     const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
300: 
301:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
302:       return jsonResponse(
303:         {
304:           error: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider and must be a safe relative directory',
305:           code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
306:         },
307:         400
308:       );
309:     }
310: 
311:     const requestPayload = {
312:       provider,
313:       retry: {
314:         maxRetries,
315:       },
316:       validation: {
317:         runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
318:         runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
319:       },
320:       autoFix: {
321:         rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
322:         bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
323:       },
324:       toolchain: {
325:         manager: typeof toolchain.manager === 'string' && toolchain.manager.trim() ? toolchain.manager.trim() : null,
326:         version: typeof toolchain.version === 'string' && toolchain.version.trim() ? toolchain.version.trim() : null,
327:       },
328:       cache: {
329:         dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
330:       },
331:       deploy: {
332:         outputDir,
333:       },
334:       rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true),
335:       provenance: {
336:         trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' && provenance.trigger.trim() ? provenance.trigger.trim() : 'manual',
337:         taskId: typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' && provenance.taskId.trim() ? provenance.taskId.trim() : null,
338:         operationId:
339:           typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' && provenance.operationId.trim() ? provenance.operationId.trim() : null,
340:         note: typeof provenance.note === 'string' && provenance.note.trim() ? provenance.note.trim() : null,
341:       },
342:     };
343: 
344:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
345:       JSON.stringify(buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload))
346:     );
347: 
348:     const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, {
349:       id: generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(),
350:       workspaceId,
351:       provider,
352:       idempotencyKey,
353:       requestPayload,
354:       requestPayloadSha256,
355:       maxRetries,
356:       provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
357:     });
358: 
359:     if (!created.reused) {
360:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
361:         workspaceId,
362:         deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
363:         eventType: 'deployment_created',
364:         payload: {
365:           provider,
366:           maxRetries,
367:           provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
368:         },
369:       });
370:     }
371: 
372:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && created.deployment.status === 'queued') {
373:       const hasPrecheckPassed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
374:         env.DB,
375:         workspaceId,
376:         created.deployment.id,
377:         'deployment_provider_precheck_passed'
378:       );
379:       const hasPrecheckFailed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
380:         env.DB,
381:         workspaceId,
382:         created.deployment.id,
383:         'deployment_provider_precheck_failed'
384:       );
385:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
386:         env.DB,
387:         workspaceId,
388:         created.deployment.id,
389:         'deployment_enqueued'
390:       );
391: 
392:       if (hasPrecheckFailed) {
393:         return jsonResponse(
394:           {
395:             error: created.deployment.error?.message ?? 'Provider precheck previously failed',
396:             code: created.deployment.error?.code ?? 'provider_deploy_failed',
397:           },
398:           400
399:         );
400:       }
401: 
402:       if (!hasPrecheckPassed && !alreadyEnqueued) {
403:         const claimTime = new Date().toISOString();
404:         const precheckLeaseCutoff = new Date(Date.now() - PROVIDER_PRECHECK_LEASE_MS).toISOString();
405:         const claimed = await env.DB
406:           .prepare(
407:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
408:              SET error_code = 'provider_precheck_running',
409:                  error_message = 'Provider precheck in progress',
410:                  updated_at = ?
411:              WHERE id = ?
412:                AND workspace_id = ?
413:                AND status = 'queued'
414:                AND (
415:                  error_code IS NULL
416:                  OR error_code = 'retry_scheduled'
417:                  OR (error_code = 'provider_precheck_running' AND updated_at <= ?)
418:                )`
419:           )
420:           .bind(claimTime, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, precheckLeaseCutoff)
421:           .run();
422: 
423:         if ((claimed.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
424:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
425:           if (concurrent) {
426:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
427:           }
428:         }
429: 
430:         let precheckChecks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
431:         try {
432:           precheckChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
433:         } catch (error) {
434:           const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
435:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
436:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
437:             .prepare(
438:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
439:                SET status = 'failed',
440:                    error_code = ?,
441:                    error_message = ?,
442:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
443:                    updated_at = ?
444:                WHERE id = ?
445:                  AND workspace_id = ?
446:                  AND status = 'queued'
447:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
448:                  AND updated_at = ?`
449:             )
450:             .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
451:             .run();
452: 
453:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
454:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
455:               workspaceId,
456:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
457:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
458:               payload: {
459:                 code: providerError.code,
460:                 message: providerError.message,
461:               },
462:             });
463:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
464:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
465:               status: 'failed',
466:               errorCode: providerError.code,
467:               errorMessage: providerError.message,
468:             });
469:             return jsonResponse({ error: providerError.message, code: providerError.code }, 400);
470:           }
471: 
472:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
473:           if (concurrent) {
474:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
475:           }
476: 
477:           throw error;
478:         }
479: 
480:         const failed = precheckChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
481:         if (failed) {
482:           const failureMessage = failed.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed';
483:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
484:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
485:             .prepare(
486:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
487:                SET status = 'failed',
488:                    error_code = ?,
489:                    error_message = ?,
490:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
491:                    updated_at = ?
492:                WHERE id = ?
493:                  AND workspace_id = ?
494:                  AND status = 'queued'
495:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
496:                  AND updated_at = ?`
497:             )
498:             .bind(failed.code, failureMessage, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
499:             .run();
500: 
501:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
502:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
503:               workspaceId,
504:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
505:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
506:               payload: {
507:                 code: failed.code,
508:                 message: failureMessage,
509:               },
510:             });
511:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
512:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
513:               status: 'failed',
514:               errorCode: failed.code,
515:               errorMessage: failureMessage,
516:             });
517:             return jsonResponse({ error: failureMessage, code: failed.code }, 400);
518:           }
519: 
520:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
521:           if (concurrent) {
522:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
523:           }
524: 
525:           throw new Error('Provider precheck failed but deployment record was not available for response');
526:         }
527: 
528:         const clearClaim = await env.DB
529:           .prepare(
530:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
531:              SET error_code = NULL,
532:                  error_message = NULL,
533:                  updated_at = ?
534:              WHERE id = ?
535:                AND workspace_id = ?
536:                AND status = 'queued'
537:                AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
538:                AND updated_at = ?`
539:           )
540:           .bind(new Date().toISOString(), created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
541:           .run();
542: 
543:         if ((clearClaim.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
544:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
545:           if (concurrent) {
546:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
547:           }
548:         }
549: 
550:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
551:           workspaceId,
552:           deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
553:           eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
554:           payload: {
555:             checks: precheckChecks,
556:           },
557:         });
558:       }
559:     }
560: 
561:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
562:     const deploymentForQueue = latestDeployment ?? created.deployment;
563: 
564:     if (deploymentForQueue.status === 'queued') {
565:       const hasEnqueuedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
566:         env.DB,
567:         workspaceId,
568:         deploymentForQueue.id,
569:         'deployment_enqueued'
570:       );
571:       const shouldRecoverQueued = created.reused && deploymentForQueue.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled';
572:       const hasRecoveredReenqueue = shouldRecoverQueued
573:         ? await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered')
574:         : false;
575: 
576:       if (!hasEnqueuedEvent || (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue)) {
577:         if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE) {
578:           await env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE.send(
579:             createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id)
580:           );
581:         } else if (ctx) {
582:           ctx.waitUntil(
583:             runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, deploymentForQueue.maxRetries + 1)
584:           );
585:         }
586: 
587:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
588:           workspaceId,
589:           deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
590:           eventType: 'deployment_enqueued',
591:           payload: {
592:             mode: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'queue' : 'inline',
593:             reused: created.reused,
594:           },
595:         });
596: 
597:         if (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue) {
598:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
599:             workspaceId,
600:             deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
601:             eventType: 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered',
602:             payload: {
603:               reason: 'retry_scheduled_replay',
604:             },
605:           });
606:         }
607:       }
608:     }
609: 
610:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: deploymentForQueue }, created.reused ? 200 : 202);
611:   } catch (error) {
612:     if (error instanceof WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError) {
613:       return jsonResponse(
614:         {
615:           error: 'Idempotency key has already been used with different payload',
616:           code: 'idempotency_key_conflict',
617:         },
618:         409
619:       );
620:     }
621: 
622:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
623:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
624:     }
625: 
626:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
627:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create workspace deployment: ${message}` }, 500);
628:   }
629: }

631: export async function handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
632:   workspaceId: string,
633:   request: Request,
634:   env: Env
635: ): Promise<Response> {
636:   const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
637:   if (enabled) {
638:     return enabled;
639:   }
640: 
641:   const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
642:   if (workspaceCheck) {
643:     return workspaceCheck;
644:   }
645: 
646:   let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
647:   try {
648:     const raw = await request.text();
649:     if (raw.trim()) {
650:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
651:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
652:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
653:       }
654:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
655:     }
656:   } catch {
657:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
658:   }
659: 
660:   const validation =
661:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
662:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
663:       : {};
664:   const autoFix =
665:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
666:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
667:       : {};
668:   const deploy =
669:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
670:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
671:       : {};
672:   const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
673:   const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
674:   if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
675:     return jsonResponse(
676:       {
677:         preflight: {
678:           ok: false,
679:           toolchain: null,
680:           checks: [{ code: 'provider_config_invalid', ok: false, details: providerConfigError }],
681:           remediations: [],
682:         },
683:         nextAction: 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER to simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets and retry preflight.',
684:       },
685:       200
686:     );
687:   }
688:   if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
689:     return jsonResponse(
690:       {
691:         preflight: {
692:           ok: false,
693:           toolchain: null,
694:           checks: [{ code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: `Unsupported provider: ${providerInput}` }],
695:           remediations: [],
696:         },
697:         nextAction: 'Use provider=cloudflare_workers_assets or provider=simulated.',
698:       },
699:       200
700:     );
701:   }
702:   const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
703:   const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
704: 
705:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
706:     return jsonResponse(
707:       {
708:         preflight: {
709:           ok: false,
710:           toolchain: null,
711:           checks: [
712:             {
713:               code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
714:               ok: false,
715:               details: 'deploy.outputDir is required and must be a safe relative directory',
716:             },
717:           ],
718:           remediations: [],
719:         },
720:         nextAction: 'Set deploy.outputDir to your static build output directory and retry preflight.',
721:       },
722:       200
723:     );
724:   }
725:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true);
726:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true);
727:   const rehydrateBaseline = parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false);
728:   const bootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false);
729: 
730:   try {
731:     const preflight = await runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(env, workspaceId, {
732:       runBuildIfPresent,
733:       runTestsIfPresent,
734:       rehydrateBaseline,
735:       bootstrapToolchain,
736:       provider,
737:       outputDir,
738:     });
739: 
740:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
741:       try {
742:         const providerChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
743:         preflight.checks.push(...providerChecks);
744:       } catch (error) {
745:         const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
746:         preflight.checks.push({ code: providerError.code, ok: false, details: providerError.message });
747:       }
748:       preflight.ok = preflight.checks.every((check) => check.ok);
749:     }
750: 
751:     const failedCheck = preflight.checks.find((check) => !check.ok);
752:     const nextAction = failedCheck
753:       ? failedCheck.code === 'validation_tooling'
754:         ? 'Disable build/test validation or install the detected package manager in the sandbox runtime image.'
755:         : failedCheck.code === 'git_baseline'
756:           ? 'Reset workspace to rebuild git baseline and retry deploy.'
757:           : failedCheck.code === 'secret_scan'
758:             ? 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying.'
759:             : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_detect'
760:               ? 'Fix package.json/lockfile metadata and retry preflight.'
761:               : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_bootstrap'
762:                 ? 'Enable auto-fix bootstrap or use a sandbox image with corepack support.'
763:                 : failedCheck.code === 'project_root'

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts

parts.text:
Confirmed blockers

- Inline cancel can dead-end in `running + cancel_requested` with no further reconciliation when queues are disabled. `handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment` only schedules a single `waitUntil(runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(..., 2))` in inline mode, and `runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries` exits after logging `deployment_cancel_reconcile_deferred` if provider status is still non-terminal (`packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts:857`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2304`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2310`). There is no re-enqueue/retrigger path here, so cancellation can stall indefinitely.
- Cancel reconciliation suppresses provider errors and converts them into perpetual retry/defer behavior instead of a terminal state. In both queue and inline reconciliation paths, provider status/cancel exceptions are swallowed by broad `catch {}` and then converted into `QueueRetryError('...cancel requested while running...')` (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1616`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1778`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2084`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2243`). A persistent provider auth/scope/config outage during cancel can therefore keep deployments stuck `running` until stale-timeout logic, while the remote deployment may continue unmanaged.

Medium-confidence risks

- Transient provider failures are likely under-classified, causing hard fail instead of retry. `parseCloudflareResult` maps most non-429 failures to `provider_deploy_failed` (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts:250`), while retry logic only treats `provider_rate_limited` or message regex hits as retryable (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:136`). Cloudflare 5xx/error bodies that do not match regex patterns will be treated as policy failures.
- If provider deployment ID is missing during cancel (e.g., failure between provider create and DB persistence), logic intentionally defers forever instead of safely converging. Paths explicitly return/throw defer when `cancelRequestedAt` is set but `providerDeploymentId` is absent (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1963`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2071`), which can leave ambiguous external state unresolved.
- `cancelDeployment` 404/409 is treated as `accepted: false` with no distinction between “already terminal” vs “unknown deployment id” (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts:357`). In adversarial/provider-drift scenarios, this can drive incorrect local retry semantics and delayed reconciliation.
